title: Brother FAX-2840 High Speed Mono Laser Fax Machine Fax 2840 FX2840 2840
detail_text: High-Speed Faxing for Your Home Office or Small Business offering fast fax transmission and high-quality laser output, the Brother IntelliFAX-2840 laser fax is a solid choice for your home office or small business. It's compact in size, energy-efficient and offers convenient, high-quality copying. You can use it for both fax and voice calls on the same telephone line and you can even connect an external answering machine. Main Features Future printing capabilityBuilt-in Hi-Speed USB 2.0 interface to connect to your computer for up to 21ppm laser printing. Superior laser outputWhether you're printing incoming faxes or making copies at up to 21cpm, you can expect high-quality laser output. 33.6K bps Super G3 fax modem.Fast fax communication (approx. 2.5 sec./page‡) and memory up to 400 pages. 20-page capacity auto document feeder.For faxing and copying multiple pages, up to legal size.

BRIGHT FINISH and CLEARNESS：high brightness and clearness paper can produce high quality documents you will be proud to distribute. title: Aofax | Paperless Digital Receiving & Sending Office Multi-Function Fax Machine
detail_text: Automatic Reception The A20 fax machine features automatic reception, allowing for efficient and streamlined document handling. Multi-Functionality This compact device serves as a fax machine, computer fax server, and digital receiver, providing a range of office solutions in one device. Small Size Despite its multifunctionality, the A20 fax machine is designed to be small, making it ideal for spaces with limited room. Digital Communication As a digital device, the A20 fax machine ensures clear and reliable communication, enhancing productivity in the workplace. Paperless Operation The Aofax A20 fax machine offers paperless operation, reducing waste and saving on printing costs.

CANCELLATION POLICY
Cancellations are free within 2 days of purchase. After that, will incur 30% cancellation fee on the purchase price.

REFUND POLICY
Refund inquiries are handled on a case-by-case basis, depending on the situation.

If an order has already been delivered to the customer, any approved refund will be subject to a deduction of 30% from the original payment as logistics fees. This deduction helps cover the costs associated with processing and delivering the order.

title: Ugreen USB to Printer Type B Cable Nylon Braided 1m 2m for Scanner Fax Machine
detail_text: High Performance for Critical Connection UGREEN 2.0 USB A Male to B Male Cable is the reliable choice for connecting devices with USB Type B Male ports such as printers, scanners, printer switch hubs, and other legacy devices that are economical to keep as a back-up. Gold-Plated Connector and Foil/Braid Shielding Corrosion-resistant gold-plated connectors & foil/braid shielding, give this resilient cable long-term use without noise or signal loss. It also protects against RF/EM interference, keeping a clear signal with little bandwidth loss for high performance. Full USB 2.0 Capability Full USB 2.0 capability, 480 Mbps data transfer speed & backwards compatibility, faster data transfer speed than most Wi-Fi connections and better security with compatible equipment. Solid & flexible Connector Tough, yet flexible PVC jacket & durable connector mold ensures for secure fits & easy cable handling. Compatible Devices Compatible with USB type B printers such as Canon Pixma MX922 / MX522 / MX452 and Epson XP-310 / Epson XP-410 / Brother HL 2270DW / Brother MFCJ450DW / HP Envy 4500 and more. Plug & Play, Easy Installation Plug-&-play: Plug the standard Type-A Male connector into your computer, and the Type-B connector into your other device. Important Note 1. Verify your device has a Type-B Female port & not a standard USB, Micro-USB or Mini-USB port. 2. This printer scanner cable is mainly used to transfer data and it cannot work as a power cable to power on the printer Walk-in warehouse self-collection at no shipping fee @ Ubi Techpark #04-52 (Lobby C) Monday to Friday 12pm-7pm (PH Not Included)

title: Brother Toner Cartridge TN2260 Brother Toner Cartridge TN2280 Brother Toner TN2260 Brother TN2260 Toner TN2280 Toner For FAX-2840 Fax Machine
detail_text: Brother Toner Cartridge TN-2260 / TN2280 TN 2260 Standard: Approx. 1200 pages In accordance with ISO/IEC 19752 TN2280 High Yield: Approx. 2600 pages In accordance with ISO/IEC 19752 Compatible: FAX-2840 Fax Machine Why Brother Genuine Supplies? Perfect print quality every time Brother Genuine ink and toner cartridges are specifically formulated to limit the risk of smudges and smears. We use the latest colour management technology to ensure our ink and toner cartridges produce the exact Pantone® colours that you need and don’t fade over time. Ensuring your business’ logos appear the same print after print. Consistently reliable ink and toner cartridges When business is non-stop, it’s often hard to keep up and you just need everything to work perfectly every time. When it comes to print reliability, it matters and having toner cartridges and ink cartridges that you can rely on is important. Brother Genuine Supplies are rigorously tested to ensure they work perfectly with your printer. Providing you with the high-quality documents that you need. Tested to the highest safety standards At Brother, we continually develop our ink cartridges and toner cartridges, to not only print the high-quality documents but to ensure that you don’t come into contact with any potential harmful particles.
detail_html:
Brother Toner Cartridge TN-2260 / TN2280

  • TN 2260 Standard: Approx. 1200 pages In accordance with ISO/IEC 19752
  • TN2280 High Yield: Approx. 2600 pages In accordance with ISO/IEC 19752
  • Compatible: FAX-2840 Fax Machine

Why Brother Genuine Supplies?

  • Perfect print quality every time

detail_text: With Mindpure USB C Printing Cable,you can easily connect your laptop to your printer. Connect a keyboard, mouse, scanner, hard drive, printer, server, camera & more, to a computer or other USB C enabled device. Have different cable lengths,1meter,1.5meter,2meter,3meter available. Just chose the length you need. Corrosion-resistant gold-plated connectors & foil/braided shielding Full USB C capability, 480 Mbps data transfer speed & backward compatibility Supports up to 127 devices on a daisy-chain configuration Tough, yet flexible PVC jacket & durable connector mold ensures for secure fits & easy cable handling Transfer files, print documents, connect a mouse/keyboard, share images, or sync devices in general.

title: Aofax | Remote Sending & Receiving Email Transfer Paperless Fax Machine
detail_text: Email Delivery The machine can send and receive faxes via email, eliminating the need for physical paper and reducing the environmental impact. Paperless Server It operates as a paperless server, further reducing waste and saving on paper costs. Local Area Network Version This version of the fax machine is designed for use in a local area network, allowing for easy integration with your existing IT infrastructure. Remote Access With its remote access feature, users can send and receive faxes from anywhere, enhancing productivity and flexibility.

Email Delivery

Paperless Server

Local Area Network Version

Remote Access



With its remote access feature, users can send and receive faxes from anywhere, enhancing productivity and flexibility.

title: Xier | Offline Computer FAX Digital Fax Machine Single Edition
detail_text: Single-User Version Designed as a single-user version, this fax machine is perfect for individuals or small offices requiring efficient and reliable faxing capabilities. Digital Fax Machine The Xuange i8 digital fax machine offers a modern solution for your office communication needs, eliminating the need for paper. Electronic Office Equipment As an electronic office equipment, it integrates seamlessly into your existing workflow, enhancing productivity and efficiency. No Paper Required By eliminating the need for paper, this fax machine helps reduce waste and save on printing costs, making it an eco-friendly choice for your business. Offline Reception This fax machine allows for offline reception, ensuring that your important documents are received even when your computer is not connected to the internet.
detail_html:
Single-User Version



Designed as a single-user version, this fax machine is perfect for individuals or small offices requiring efficient and reliable faxing capabilities.






Digital Fax Machine



The Xuange i8 digital fax machine offers a modern solution for your office communication needs, eliminating the need for paper.






Electronic Office Equipment



As an electronic office equipment, it integrates seamlessly into your existing workflow, enhancing productivity and efficiency.






No Paper Required



By eliminating the need for paper, this fax machine helps reduce waste and save on printing costs, making it an eco-friendly choice for your business.






Offline Reception



This fax machine allows for offline reception, ensuring that your important documents are received even when your computer is not connected to the internet.

title: (Bulky) BROTHER FAX-2840 High Speed Laser Fax Machine
detail_text: BROTHER FAX-2840 High Speed Laser Fax Machine Basic Specs ADF (Automatic Document Feeder) Max. 20 pages Speed Dial 200 stations Product Dimensions (Width X Depth X Height) 368 mm × 311 mm × 360 mm Weight 9 kg Fax Compatibility ITU-T Super Group 3 Modem Speed 33,600 bps (with automatic fallback) Scanning Width Max. 208 mm Printing Width Max. 208 mm Greyscale 8-bit/256 levels Horizontal Resolution 8 dot/mm Standard 3.85 line/mm Fine 7.7 line/mm Photo 7.7 line/mm Superfine 15.4 line/mm One Touch Dial 22 stations Groups Max. 8 Broadcasting 272 locations Automatic Redial 3 times at 5-minute intervals Memory Transmission Max. 400 pages Out of Paper Reception Max. 400 pages Document Size Document Size (Single-sided) - Width 147.3 mm to 215.9 mm Document Size (Single-sided) - Length 147.3 mm to 355.6 mm Display & Memory Memory Capacity 16 MB Copy Colour / Monochrome Monochrome Copy Width Max. 204 mm Multiple Copies Stacks up to 99 pages Reduce/Enlarge 25% to 400% First Copy Out Time Less than 12 seconds Printer Resolution 2,400 dpi × 600 dpi, 600 dpi × 600 dpi Print Speed Max. 20 pages/minute (A4 size) First Print Out Time Less than 10 seconds Print Method Electrophotographic laser printer Copy Resolution Max. 300 dpi × 600 dpi Paper handling Paper Tray - Paper Type Plain, thin or recycled paper Paper Tray - Paper Size Letter, A4, B5 (ISO/JIS), A5, A5 (Long Edge), B6 (ISO), A6, Executive (legal or folio for Asia) Paper Tray - Paper Weight 60 gsm to 105 gsm Paper Tray - Maximum Paper Tray Capacity Up to 250 sheets of 80 gsm plain paper Manual Feed Slot - Paper Type Envelope, labels, thin paper, thick paper, recycled paper, bond paper or plain paper Manual Feed Slot - Paper Size Width: 76.2 mm to 216 mm Length: 116 mm to 406.4 mm Manual Feed Slot - Paper Weight 60 gsm to 163 gsm Manual Feed Slot - Maximum Paper Tray Capacity One sheet at a time, 80 gsm plain paper Face-Down Output Tray Max. 100 sheets of 80 gsm plain paper Face-Up Output Tray One sheet (face-up print delivery to the face-up output tray) Operation Power Source 220 - 240 V AC 50/60Hz Power Consumption (Average) - Peak Approx. 1,080 W at 25°C Power Consumption (Average) - Copying Approx. 420 W at 25°C Power Consumption (Average) - Ready Approx. 55 W at 25°C Power Consumption (Average) - Deep Sleep Approx. 1.5 W Noise level - Sound power - Operating (Printing): L wa d = 6.18 dB (A) Noise level - Sound power - Standby L wa d = 4.25 dB (A) Noise level - Sound pressure - Operating (Printing) L pa m = 53 dB (A) Noise level - Sound pressure - Standby L pa m = 30 dB (A) Temperature Operating 10°C to 32.5°C Temperature - Storage 0°C to 40°C Humidity - Operating 20% to 80% (without condensation) Humidity - Storage 10% to 90% (without condensation)

product.highlights:
Compact Wireless Office All-In-One with Fax and Automatic 2-Sided Printing

This compact Office All-In-One features a 20-sheet Auto Document Feeder and XL cartridge options for lower cost printing.

  • Print, Scan, Copy, Fax
  • ISO standard print speed (A4): up to 8.8 ipm black / 4.4 ipm
  • Wireless, Mopria, AirPrint, Direct Wireless
  • Recommended print volume: 30 to 100 pages

XL Cartridges for Higher Yield

Choose between ink cartridges of different page yields, depending on your usage requirements.

 

2-Line Mono LCD Display

Equipped with a 2-Line LCD display for easy navigation and confirmaton of print settings.

 

Auto Duplex Printing

Save on time and resources by printing on both sides of the paper automatically.

 

Auto Document Feeder

20-sheet ADF for copying/scanning.

 

Mobile & Cloud Printing

Print from smartphones, tablets, laptops and cloud storage with the free Canon PRINT Inkjet/SELPHY, and Canon Easy-PhotoPrint Editor apps.

 

Easy Setup of Printer

Seamless set-up of the printer with Canon PRINT Inkjet/SELPHY app via the mobile phone.

aiTexts: The HP Envy 6020e Printer delivers high-quality color and mono printing with resolutions up to 4800 x 1200 DPI and 1200 x 1200 DPI respectively.
It supports print, copy, scan, and fax functions with convenient wireless connectivity options including AirPrint, USB, and Wi-Fi.
Print speeds range between 11-20 pages per minute, suitable for personal and small office use.
The input tray holds up to 100 sheets; 25 sheets fit in the output tray.
Ideal for everyday tasks with automatic two-sided printing for paper saving and efficient document management.

title: Aofax | Network Multi-User Paperless Fax Machine with Roaming Send/Receive
detail_text: Roaming Reception The roaming reception feature enables you to receive faxes even when you're away from your office. Network Version This network version allows multiple users to access the fax server, enhancing efficiency and collaboration. Paperless Operation The A60 fax machine operates without paper, reducing waste and saving space in your office. Digital Technology Utilizing digital technology, this fax machine offers high-quality transmission and reception of documents. Free Fax Service Enjoy free fax service with this device, eliminating additional costs for sending and receiving faxes.
